// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import java.lang.foreign.*
import java.lang.foreign.ValueLayout.*
import java.lang.invoke.MethodHandle
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, NativeLoader, Scratch, Layouts, StructAbiCheck, UpcallBridge}

final class BufferBindingsImpl extends BufferBindings:
    import BufferBindingsImpl.*

    def process(buf: Buffer[Byte], len: Int)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): kyo.Fiber.Unsafe[Int, Any] =
        kyo.ffi.internal.BlockingBridge.run {
            val __kyoScratch$ = Scratch.currentFor("kyo.example.BufferBindings", Scratch.configuredSize)
            val __kyoMark$ = __kyoScratch$.mark()
            try
                val bufSeg = kyo.ffi.internal.FfiUnsafe.expect[MemorySegment](buf.raw.asInstanceOf[AnyRef], classOf[MemorySegment], "MemorySegment on JVM", "kyo.example.BufferBindings", "process")
                val errnoSeg = __kyoScratch$.alloc(captureLayout.byteSize(), captureLayout.byteAlignment(), "kyo.example.BufferBindings", "process")
                val retVal: Int = processMH.invokeExact(errnoSeg, bufSeg, len)
                retVal
            finally __kyoScratch$.reset(__kyoMark$)
        }
end BufferBindingsImpl

object BufferBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.BufferBindings")
    private val lib      = NativeLoader.load("kyo_buf")
    private val linker   = Linker.nativeLinker()
    private val capture  = Linker.Option.captureCallState("errno")
    private val captureLayout = Linker.Option.captureStateLayout()

    private val processMH: MethodHandle = linker.downcallHandle(
        lib.find("process").orElseThrow(),
        FunctionDescriptor.of(JAVA_INT, ADDRESS, JAVA_INT),
        capture
    )
end BufferBindingsImpl
